title: JEI Integration: Reborn
description: Added more information tips for items.
body:
# Welcome use the JEI Integration Reborn Mod

This mod brings [JEI Integration](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei-integration) functionality to newer versions of Minecraft.

## After you have installed the mod and configured it correctly, your items will display:

1.  burn time
2.  durability
3.  maximum stack size
4.  tags
5.  data components
6.  translation key
7.  enchantability
8.  hunger/saturation

## Configuration Notice:

⚠️ All features are disabled by default You must edit the config file to activate desired functionality. This allows precise control over your JEI interface and prevents information overload.
